spec.name: Shockstill
spec.summary: A spell that dampens effects using electric magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that dampens effects using electric magic. A triangle dampen/affect recipe that channels electric discipline into shock output. It applies a cylinder pattern against where written across self reach with immediate persistence.
